core_mechanism: exact solution of a large-deviation (least-action / optimal-fluctuation-path) variational principle by a canonical (symplectic) transformation that decouples the coupled Hamiltonian field equations into an integrable form, yielding closed-form large-deviation rate functions
brief_reason: The abstract frames the problem as macroscopic fluctuation theory (a large-deviation action-minimization) and states that it becomes exactly solvable through a canonical transformation that lets them compute the large-deviation statistics of tracer position and integrated current explicitly.
